selected_work: Inspect the checked-out Sentinel repository for a hosted CI workflow and record its actual parity state.
Run Sentinel Go tests, vet, and build without changing the Sentinel checkout.
Record that Sentinel remains local, deterministic, fixture-backed, dry-run only, with no continuous hosted monitoring or promotion activation.
objective: Audit ao-sentinel hosted CI workflow parity and preserve its structural and fixture-only monitoring boundary through a bounded Atlas compatibility evidence node with no promotion.
selection_reason: single ready node selected from the post-node-34 workgraph; Sentinel hosted CI parity and monitoring boundaries are audited read-only
